ai_epistemology_wave_method.M1_COI: H9 candidates must satisfy H1 completion channels, H2 OSAG checks, H7 admission, and physical W-gates at once.
ai_epistemology_wave_method.M3_differential_verification: Each case is classified by a physical W-gate route and an H7 admission route.
ai_epistemology_wave_method.M6_execution_mode: H9 is a high-cascade shared-context gate, so it runs as one batched local pass rather than broad fan-out.

honest_current_result: CRISPR spacer acquisition and dynamic/Floquet code behavior are useful calibrators, but both are absorbed by fixed sequence space or fixed platform/schedule before a source-crossing claim. The only H7-admitted packet remains formal/local OSAG support.
next_track_1_recommendation: H6 internal versus external completion boundary, or pause until a new concrete H7-admitted physical packet exists.

results.reason: The physical route reaches a terminal absorber before any source claim.
